title: OMT's Optimized Horizons
description: Aimed To Make JJThunder To The Max World Generation More faster and optimized with distant Horizons
body:
Distant Horizons Optimized & JJThunder to the Max Modpack![Took Me 8 Hours To Render 512 Chunks, This is The Result](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49f7bbd495eeac753ebe43921f2dcf4fdd3fea26.jpeg)


**Embark on an Elevated Adventure!**

Explore a vast, beautifully realized world with the Distant Horizons Optimized and JJThunder to the Max modpack! This immersive collection combines stunning visuals and enhanced gameplay, ensuring an unforgettable experience in your favorite universe.

Key Features:

Enhanced Graphics: Experience breathtaking landscapes and distant terrain rendered in stunning clarity. Distant Horizons Optimized utilizes advanced rendering techniques to bring the world around you to life.

Dynamic Weather and Lightning: JJThunder to the Max adds an exciting layer of realism with realistic mountain ranges, huge rivers,and more. Feel the thrill as storm clouds gather and lightning strikes illuminate the sky!

Performance Optimization: This modpack is carefully curated for both beauty and performance, ensuring smooth gameplay even in expansive environments.

Immersive Soundscapes: Engage with enhanced audio effects that immerse you in your surroundings, from the rustling of leaves to the roar of thunder, creating a captivating atmosphere.

User-Friendly Interface: Easy installation and intuitive settings allow you to dive into action without hassle.
Shaders : Bliss Shaders, Link : [Here!](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader)

To Use JJThunder, Follow These Steps:
1. While Creating A New World, Go To The "More" Section.
2. Click On Datapack Button
3. Open Folder
4. Move Your JJThunder To The Max DataPack There.
